separation.details: Criterion (b) passes: KW p≈0 on bootstrap distributions across {L0,L2,L3,L5}. Note: d_ℓ is NOT monotone; d_L0=12.40 is the peak, d_L2=8.69 is the trough. This results in degenerate P_GIT-sem = L0 for all tasks (documented anomaly).

S-code.reason: All fallback models unavailable on LiteLLM gateway: nomic-embed-text, mxbai-embed-large, text-embedding-3-small all returned 400.

S-struct.finding: L1/L2 zero-edge → high apparent d (random walk self-visits). L3+ connected → low d (structured manifold). Clear CI non-overlap between L1/L2 (32.79) and L3 (2.72). THIS IS AN INVERTED PATTERN: d DECREASES when adding structure.
S-struct.finding_interpretation: node2vec compresses connected graphs to low-d manifolds; disconnected graphs yield high-d noise. S-struct separation signal is present but in opposite direction to language embedding.

separation.details: Both criteria pass. Criterion (a): |d_L5-d_L2|=30.06 > 2, CI [1.80,2.83] vs [26.10,34.60] non-overlapping. Criterion (b): KW p≈0. However, the separation is INVERTED (coarser levels have HIGHER d), resulting in degenerate P_GIT-struct = L1 for all tasks.

S-struct.l1_l2_zero_edges_reason: ArchGuard mermaid+parser scope: no entity-level inheritance/composition relations exist between the 31 callgraph-scope classes. All entity relations are to external-scope classes (cli, plugins, etc.).

gate_decision.rule: >= 2 sensors separate → continue B-series (Phase 71 full A+B+C)
gate_decision.note: Both sensors separate, but predictions are DEGENERATE: P_GIT-sem=L0 and P_GIT-struct=L1 for all tasks. This is a valid (if unexpected) pre-registered result. B-series proceeds but P_GIT predictors are expected to perform near P_random or worse.

deviations.description: S-code sensor skipped: no distinct embedding model available on LiteLLM gateway. Proceeding with 2-sensor design.
deviations.impact: Reduced power; max separating sensors = 2 instead of 3.

deviations.description: S-struct L1/L2 have zero entity-level edges because ArchGuard mermaid+parser scope lacks within-scope inheritance/dependency relations.
deviations.impact: L1/L2 structurally indistinguishable from L0 in S-struct. High apparent d (32.79) is noise from zero-edge random walks.

deviations.description: P_GIT-sem and P_GIT-struct are degenerate (predict L0 and L1 respectively for all tasks) because the d_ℓ profiles are non-monotone.
deviations.impact: B-series B-B1 and B-B2 tests will almost certainly show P_GIT predictors do NOT outperform P_random.
